_comment: Edit `bindings` only — friendly control name -> herdr action. Actions: tab_next, tab_prev, workspace_next, workspace_prev, pane_left, pane_right, pane_up, pane_down, pane_zoom, scroll_up, scroll_down, enter, escape, voice, dictation, noop. Scrolling is analog (right stick) configured under settings.scroll. The `profile` maps each friendly name to the raw SDL index; run `--calibrate` to rebuild it.

profile._comment: friendly name -> raw SDL index. Defaults are for the Switch Pro via SDL; if buttons feel wrong, run: python controller_daemon.py --calibrate
